changelog:
v1.1.9 (2026-05-13)

[Render] Fix manual-image long videos rendering as one huge scene. Manual images now render in ~60s scene chunks for better stability and speed.
[Render] Prevent WinError 206 path-too-long failures by shortening new and queued output paths automatically.
[Render] Use normal FFmpeg process priority by default so renders no longer run below normal priority.
[STT] Use short temp filenames for long audio processing to avoid Windows path length failures.
[Settings] Restore subtitle left/right layout control and hide advanced margin fields from the UI.
[Updater] Harden auto-update validation and logging so failed downloads or bad update URLs do not silently close the app.
